ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week the event occurs */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the event occurs */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Date of the event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the event starts */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the event takes place */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "external_link" TEXT /* External link for more information */,
  "ticket_info" TEXT /* Information about ticketing */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of entry */,
  "age_restriction" TEXT /* Age restriction for the event */,
  "event_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "event_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Current status of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who organized the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the venue is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the venue */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the venue */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the event category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL for an icon representing the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket type */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the ticket is for */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of the ticket (e.g., General, VIP) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Number of tickets available for sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the ticket type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the ticket type */,
  "seating_type" TEXT /* Type of seating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., attendee, organizer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the user registered for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who registered */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket type purchased */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of tickets purchased */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the tickets purchased */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional code */,
  "code" TEXT /* Promotional code string */,
  "discount_percent" REAL /* Discount percentage offered by the promo code */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the promo code */,
  "usage_limit" INTEGER /* Limit on the number of times the promo code can be used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the promotional code was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the promotional code */,
  "min_purchase_amount" REAL /* Minimum purchase amount required to use the promo code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the feedback is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the feedback was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the user attended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attending the event */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of the attendance (e.g., confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "checked_in_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user checked in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendees_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "event_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-category pair */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the event-category relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the event-category relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_categories_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event organizer entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event organized */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the organizer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the event-organizer relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the event-organizer relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_organizers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_organizers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
